name: energy-ops-agent
description: Optimizes B2B building energy decisions during extreme weather and utility peak-demand pricing conflicts using grounded building, weather, pricing, and occupancy context.
invocation_examples: Optimize MedTech HQ during the heat dome and peak-demand surge.
Run the rare-event simulation and summarize the observability trace.
Explain which non-critical flexible loads should be shed before changing critical-zone HVAC.
